long_description:
Collect SOS report using https://github.ibm.com/storage-sre-and-operations/SOP/blob/a18a7a553ba4309f65390232dce517f77b5bd99f/platform/alerts/troubleshooting_nfs_ganesha_alerts.md#6-data-collection-for-support-escalation
and outputs of below commands 
ceph status
ceph health detail
ceph df
ceph osd df tree
ceph mon stat
ceph quorum_status -f json-pretty
ceph mon dump
ceph report
short_description: To collect SOS report and outputs of below commands on SYD regional cluster mzonech1 for a ceph case
